prompt: You buy groceries for $43 and pay with a $50 bill. How much change do you get?
A roast costs $18. The potatoes cost $6 and a bottle of wine is $14. How much for the whole meal?
There are 144 cans of soup on a shelf. The clerk sells 38. How many cans remain?
A walking path is 8 blocks long. You walk it 3 times this week. How many blocks total?
Your monthly heating bill was $128 in November and $156 in December. How much for both months?
A recipe makes 24 dumplings. You serve 4 people 5 each. How many are left?
A garden has 6 rows with 8 tomato plants in each row. How many plants in total?
You have $250 in your wallet. You spend $87 on groceries and $24 on gas. How much remains?
A roast cooks 20 minutes per pound. How long for a 7-pound roast?
Yesterday's high was 81°F. Today's is 14 degrees cooler. What is today's high?
A library has 425 books in fiction and 318 in non-fiction. How many books in all?
You buy 4 packs of birdseed at $7 each. How much do you spend?
A trip is 264 miles. You have driven 175. How many miles are left?
A jar holds 60 jelly beans. You divide them equally between 5 grandchildren. How many each?
Your weekly shopping was $94 last week and $78 this week. How much was spent over both weeks?
A bag of dog food lasts 9 days. How many days will 4 bags last?
There are 365 days in a year. You have been retired for 218 of them. How many remain?
A rose bush sells for $12. You buy 6 for the front bed. How much do they cost?
You order $48 of takeout and the delivery fee is $7. You give a $10 tip. What is the total?
Your bank balance is $635. You withdraw $80. What is the new balance?
A garden bed is 24 feet long. You plant tulips every 3 feet. How many tulips fit if you plant at every mark including both ends?
A stew calls for 2 pounds of beef per 6 servings. How much beef do you need for 18 servings?
An auditorium has 32 rows with 18 seats per row. How many seats in total?
Your phone bill is $54 a month. How much do you pay over 6 months?
There are 240 minutes in 4 hours. You spend half that time gardening. How many minutes in the garden?
A church has collected $1,250 toward a $1,800 roof repair. How much more is needed?
A baker makes 9 dozen rolls. How many rolls is that?
You walk 3 miles a day for a week. How many miles in total?
A theater sells 287 tickets for the matinee and 412 for the evening show. How many in total?
Your savings account had $812. You added $145 and took out $60. What is the balance?
A pot holds 8 quarts of soup. You ladle out 5 servings of 1 quart each. How many quarts remain?
A road trip is 432 miles. You drive 156 in the morning and 178 in the afternoon. How many miles are left?
A box of pens has 24 inside. A teacher buys 5 boxes. How many pens?
Your prescription is for 90 pills, 1 a day. How many pills are left after 3 weeks?
An hour-long show has 5 commercial breaks of 4 minutes each. How many minutes are commercials?
You buy a coat on sale: $80 marked down to $58. How much did you save?
A field can grow 40 watermelons per row. How many will 7 rows produce?
A flight is 480 minutes long. You have been flying 215 minutes. How many minutes remain?
Your grocery list says: 4 lbs of apples at $2/lb, and 3 lbs of pears at $3/lb. What is the total?
A reservoir holds 950 gallons. 372 gallons have been used. How many gallons remain?
A train ticket is $46 and an adult senior pass costs $8 less. What is the senior pass price?
A bookshelf holds 32 books per shelf. There are 6 shelves. How many books fit?
A bag of soil weighs 40 pounds. You carry 5 bags into the garden. How many pounds in all?
Your power bill was $124 in June, $138 in July, and $129 in August. What is the total?
There are 60 minutes in an hour. You bake bread for 1 hour 25 minutes. How many minutes total?
A trip costs $245 per person. How much for 3 people?
A community garden has 15 plots. 9 are already taken. How many are still available?
A turkey weighs 12 pounds and roasts 15 minutes per pound. How many minutes in the oven?
Your wallet has 3 twenty-dollar bills, 4 ten-dollar bills, and 2 five-dollar bills. How much in total?
A movie ticket costs $13. You take 4 grandchildren and yourself. How much for tickets?
